The months of planning behind US-Israeli mission to target Iran's supreme leaderA piece of crucial intelligence arrived just hours before the attack on a compound in central Tehran. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c86y5540vnno?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c86y5540vnno#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 14:45:56 GMT
Two ships hit near Strait of Hormuz as fears grow of oil price risesInternational shipping is said to have come to a standstill at the strait's entrance, with fears of disruption already pushing up global oil prices. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75evve6l63o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c75evve6l63o#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 16:37:27 GMT
'It's eerie' - Dubai on edge as city comes under attack by IranOne British holidaymaker called it "surreal" to see people try to enjoy themselves as smoke rises nearby. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20lggwk134o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c20lggwk134o#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 16:53:47 GMT
At least 153 dead after reported strike on school, Iran saysIran has blamed the US and Israel for the strike; the US is looking into reports of the incident, while the IDF says it is "not aware" of operations in the area. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1l7rvqq51eo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c1l7rvqq51eo#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 15:32:26 GMT
In maps: Strikes across Iran and the Middle EastIsrael and the US continue strikes on Iran, while Iran steps up attacks across the region in retaliation for the death of Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 16:58:50 GMT
UK troops and civilians in Middle East put at risk by Iran strikes, Healey saysBritish military personnel at a base in Bahrain were "within several hundred yards" of a strike, the defence secretary says. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crrxkjxg1zpo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/crrxkjxg1zpo#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 18:11:49 GMT
Flights cancelled and new travel warnings issued after Iran strikes BA and Virgin Atlantic are among major airlines to ground services to the Middle East in light of the attacks. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0rjpr575g9o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c0rjpr575g9o#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 18:05:14 GMT

Deadly Texas bar shooting is 'potentially an act of terrorism', FBI saysTwo people were killed and 14 injured, with the suspected gunman also shot dead on the scene. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgjznzgly0po?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cgjznzgly0po#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 17:11:18 GMT
